privileged_info_summary: The task requires modifying the real-world Bologna Pasubio SUMO scenario located at /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio to add parking features. The data originates from the official SUMO scenarios based on real-world traffic in Bologna, Italy. The environment setup scripts correctly create the required scenario and output directories. The task constraints are strictly enforced by the verifier: the agent must create at least 4 parking areas with a combined minimum capacity of 40, and configure at least 5 vehicles with a stop duration of at least 60 seconds.
